series_metadata.series_description: Collective Bargaining Agreements between employer and employee organizations.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: In 2016, microform prior 1995 was converted electronic format. Converted electronic format is retained permanently, microform may be destroyed. ; Paper: All CBA''s submitted in paper format will be converted electronic format. Once converted and saved into Clearinghouse Database, paper copies may be destroyed. Electronic copy is retained permanently. ; Electronic: Since 1995 CBA''s are scanned and electronic copy is retained permanently. Electronic copy of current contract is available on SERB website
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Trash ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Permanent
